home.heroTitle: Traditional brush craft for modern watercolor artists.
home.heroSubtitle: Sicon Art connects a living Chinese brush-making tradition with the needs of watercolor painters, urban sketchers, and artists who want expressive control from one beautiful tool.
home.featuredTitle: Start with the brushes artists reach for first.
home.finderTitle: Choose by how you paint, not by guesswork.
home.finderBody: Find a brush by mark type, handle format, and hair feel. The full guided flow will connect to live product recommendations.
home.craftTitle: A bridge between ancient brush wisdom and watercolor practice.
home.craftBodyOne: Every Sicon Art brush begins with the idea that tool character matters. Water holding, point, snap, release, and handle balance all change the way paint moves across paper.
home.craftBodyTwo: The new storefront will make those differences easier to understand, so artists can buy with confidence instead of sorting through a generic catalog.

shop.title: Shop Sicon Art Brushes
shop.subtitle: Browse handcrafted brushes for watercolor, urban sketching, travel painting, washes, detail work, and expressive line.
shop.filterNote: Interactive filtering will connect to the commerce backend. This scaffold already stores category, handle, feel, level, and use-case data for every product.

product.madeFor: Made for the way this brush moves.

finder.title: A calmer way to choose the right brush.
finder.subtitle: The guided finder will turn painting style, handle preference, and brush feel into direct product recommendations.

style.title: What do you paint?
style.body: Choose detail, wash, travel sketching, flat shapes, or line-and-wash.

handle.title: Where do you paint?
handle.body: Studio painters may prefer long handles, while travel artists often need compact brushes.

feel.title: How should it feel?
feel.body: Soft brushes hold water for washes. Springy brushes give sharper control. Balanced brushes sit between both.

about.title: Where ancient craft meets modern art.
about.subtitle: Sicon Art was born from a simple belief: the soul of traditional Chinese brush making deserves to live in the hands of today's artists.

craft.title: Traditional craft
craft.body: Our brushes draw from Chinese brush-making techniques refined across generations, with attention to hair selection, tip shape, water capacity, and balance.

watercolor.title: Watercolor purpose
watercolor.body: Each brush is presented by how it behaves for watercolor, sketching, detail work, washes, and expressive marks.

support.title: Artist support
support.body: The new Sicon Art store is designed to help artists choose confidently, ask questions, and understand care, shipping, and returns clearly.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Ask about brush selection, custom orders, wholesale, shipping, or product care.

different.q: What makes Sicon Art brushes different?
different.a: Sicon Art focuses on traditional Chinese brush forms adapted for watercolor, with attention to water holding, fine points, natural hair feel, and expressive control.

hair.a: Brushes may use natural hair blends chosen for softness, absorbency, point, and spring. Final product pages will list specific material details where confirmed.

media.q: Can I use them with watercolor, ink, and gouache?
media.a: Yes. They are designed primarily for watercolor and also suit ink and gouache when cleaned carefully after use.

care.q: How do I care for a natural hair brush?
care.a: Rinse gently after painting, reshape the point, and dry flat or hanging with the tip down. Avoid leaving natural hair brushes standing in water.

shipping.a: Yes. Shipping is planned as an international checkout flow with country-based rates and clear customs/import notes.

returns.a: Returns support will be shown clearly before checkout. Final legal policy text will be reviewed before launch.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.empty: Your cart is empty while the checkout flow is being connected.

checkout.title: Secure checkout
checkout.body: The commerce backend is scaffolded with orders, customers, addresses, and line items. Payment provider wiring will be added after the checkout provider is approved.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.body: Orders ship from Dongguan, China. Final shipping rates, timelines, and customs notes will be migrated from the existing policy documents and reviewed before launch.

returns.title: Return & Exchange Policy
returns.body: Sicon Art wants artists to love their brushes. Final return and exchange conditions will be migrated from the existing policy documents and reviewed before launch.

footer.tagline: Handcrafted Chinese brushes for watercolor, urban sketching, and expressive painting.
